problem id: 0e3962f6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3)

examples:
  00101110 -> 01110001
  00100110 -> 00110001
  01101001 -> 01001011
  01110111 -> 10111011
  01001011 -> 01011010
  11000010 -> 00010110
  10000100 -> 00100100
  01010111 -> 10111010
  11001010 -> 01010110

query: 11011111
predicted answer: 11111110
